label: Inloggning — Supabase
summary: Supabase Auth provider under the shared 'auth' capability (clerk-auth is the default; this dossier wins on an EXPLICIT Supabase ask via relevanceKeywords, and is pinned automatically when 'subscriptions'/paddle-billing is selected). Ships cookie-based SSR sessions, middleware session refresh, a server client, a browser client, and an OAuth code-exchange callback route. In demo mode (mock: visual) the login UI renders fully and submitting shows the honest 'Auth ej konfigurerat' notice — never a fake session.
summarySv: Inloggning via Supabase. Väljs när sajten uttryckligen ska använda Supabase för konton/inloggning, eller automatiskt ihop med prenumerationer (Paddle). Utan riktiga nycklar visas inloggningsytan i demoläge med en tydlig notis — ingen låtsas-inloggning sker.

envVars.purpose: Supabase project URL used by the browser, server, middleware and callback clients (Supabase project → API settings). Tagged 'feature-runtime': auth cannot work without a real value, but the code degrades at runtime (middleware passes through, UI shows the 'Auth ej konfigurerat' notice) instead of crashing — a missing value is an F3 warning, not a build blocker.

Supabase anon public API key used by the browser, server, middleware and callback clients (Supabase project → API settings). Tagged 'feature-runtime' like NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: the code degrades to the unconfigured-auth notice at runtime instead of throwing, so a missing value is a runtime warning rather than a hard build blocker.
